title: Judges (Salaries and Condition of service) (Amendment) Regulations, 2022

sections.heading: (1) These Regulations may be cited as the Judges (Salaries Title and
sections.text:
and Condition of service) (Amendment) Regulations, 2022, and commencement
shall be read as one with the Judges (Salaries and Condition of S.I. No. 140
service), Regulations 1996, in these Regulations referred to as the of 1996
principal Regulations.
(2) These Regulations shall be deemed to have come into
operation on 1st January, 2021.

sections.heading: Regulation 5 of the principal Regulations is amended by Amendment
sections.text:

5
the following:
(3) Where a Judge provides own accommodation, the
Government shall pay to the Judge a housing allowance set out
in the First Schedule.
